Second Re-Notice Of Motion For Attorneys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Aug-07-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The cause came on calendar this day for OSC code enforcement. Anita Correa present in Court represented by Robert Hyatt, Esq. Neli Palma, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff. Second Amended Declaration filed in open court by Plaintiff. Court grants Plaintiff attorney fees and costs in the sum of $6,436.61.
